type: Interventional Radiology — Pre-Procedure / Biopsy Planning Note
author: Dr. Jeff Weinstein (Interventional Radiology)
content:
INTERVENTIONAL RADIOLOGY — PRE-PROCEDURE PLANNING

Procedure planned: CT-guided percutaneous core biopsy of the right-hepatic-lobe lesion. Scheduled: 8/10/2027 (outpatient).

Indication: Tissue diagnosis of a 17 cm right-hepatic-lobe lesion concerning for malignancy.

Peri-procedural anticoagulation instructions (per IR protocol for this higher-bleeding-risk procedure):
- HOLD apixaban for THREE (3) DAYS prior to the procedure (last dose accordingly), to minimize bleeding risk during a deep solid-organ biopsy.
- Resume anticoagulation after the procedure once hemostasis is confirmed.
- No bridging planned.

Patient counseled on holding the medication and on signs of bleeding. He was advised to call or present for any recurrent chest pain or shortness of breath in the interim.
attestation: Electronically signed by Dr. Jeff Weinstein, MD (Interventional Radiology). 8/8/2027.
